label: Button
summary: The beveled system button; pressing it nudges the label one pixel down-right.
era: The silver Windows 95 push button, raised at rest, sunken while you hold it, the most-pressed rectangle of the decade.

classes.name: rs-btn
classes.role: the raised bevel button; :active sinks it and nudges the label 1px

classes.name: rs-btn--primary
classes.role: modifier: bold, accent-faced, the default action

classes.name: rs-btn--link
classes.role: modifier: dressed as a link, still a button

a11y: Always a real <button>, focus, Space and Enter come free, and the --link disguise is still a button underneath. Disabled buttons keep the engraved gray text, which WCAG exempts as inactive UI.
